news.title: Dell shares surge as AI server demand drives record fourth-quarter results
news.summary: Investing.com -- Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE:DELL) shares surged 7% in after-hours trading Thursday following a dominant fourth-quarter performance that exceeded Wall Street expectations. The Texas-based hardware giant benefited significantly from an accelerating corporate pivot toward artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company reported non-GAAP earnings per share of $3.89, handily beating the consensus analyst estimate of $3.52. Revenue for the period reached $33.4 billion, a 39% year-

news.title: Dell Technologies Stock Pops on Strong Earnings. AI Demand Boosts Revenue.
news.summary: Revenue for AI-optimized servers was $8.95 billion in the quarter, a 342% increase from the prior year.

news.title: Dell shares surge after record Q4 earnings
news.summary: Dell Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:DELL) shares jumped more than 9% in after-hours trading Thursday following a blockbuster fourth-quarter earnings report, fueled by soaring demand for AI-optimized servers. news.title: Dell Technologies: Fiscal Q4 Earnings Snapshot
news.summary: The Round Rock, Texas-based company said it had net income of $3.37 per share. Earnings, adjusted for one-time gains and costs, came to $3.89 per share. The results topped Wall Street expectations.

news.title: Dell Technologies (DELL) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
news.summary: Dell Technologies (DELL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +9.92% and +4.61%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

news.title: Dell Stock Jumps As Computer Maker Trounces Estimates
news.summary: Computer maker Dell Technologies trounced estimates for its fiscal fourth quarter and with its outlook. Dell stock jumped on the news.

news.title: Dell Technologies Delivers Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2026 Results
news.summary: ROUND ROCK, Texas, February 26, 2026--Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces financial results for its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full year ended January 30, 2026. The company also provides guidance for its fiscal 2027 first quarter and full year.
